title: Zoom Logs managed ingestion connector (Beta) ​
body:
**June 2, 2026**

The Zoom Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest user sign-in/sign-out activity logs and admin operation logs from Zoom into Databricks. See [Zoom Logs connector](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/zoom-logs).
